plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Read-only code review slash commands with stack-specific variants under `/review-<stack>`. Reports findings without editing files.

plugins.name: update-ai-config
plugins.description: Reviews the entire codebase against the project's AI meta configuration files and reports what should be added, updated, or created. Read-only — reports findings without editing files.

plugins.name: apply-fix
plugins.description: Applies fixes (from prior review findings or check failures) and iterates the project's check commands (lint, type-check, build, test) until all pass.

plugins.name: playwright-e2e
plugins.description: Slash commands that orchestrate Playwright's auto-generated planner / generator / healer agents for end-to-end testing in CI. Pairs with `npx playwright init-agents --loop=claude`.

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Groups uncommitted changes by relatedness and opens one PR per group from a fresh branch off main (falls back to a single PR when only one group).
